hero.body: Pick a framework. Configure. Launch in 60 seconds. No code required, no infrastructure to manage. 4 frameworks, 20+ platforms, free tier with BYOK.

agentDiscovery.heading: Command an army of subagents
agentDiscovery.body: Your local coding agent becomes a fleet commander. Paste this prompt — it registers on Hatcher in your name, spins up always-on subagents (Telegram bots, research loops, Discord mods, monitors), and keeps controlling them long after your session ends.
agentDiscovery.step01: Send this prompt to your AI coding agent — Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, Hermes, or any agent that can fetch URLs and run shell commands.
agentDiscovery.step02: Agent registers an account with your email and sends you a verification link.
agentDiscovery.step03: Click verify. Your agent picks a template, deploys, and hands you a running AI.

howItWorks.heading: 3 steps. 60 seconds.
howItWorks.subheading: No coding, no setup guides, no configuration files.

steps.title: Pick a framework
steps.desc: OpenClaw, Hermes, ElizaOS, or Milady. Each has unique strengths — browser control, memory, multi-agent, on-chain.

steps.title: Configure
steps.desc: Name, personality, integrations. Fill a simple form — no config files, no YAML.

steps.title: Deploy
steps.desc: One click. Your agent is live on every connected platform in under 60 seconds.

useCases.heading: What will you hatch?
useCases.subheading: From personal productivity to business automation — your agent, your rules.

items.title: Food & nutrition
items.desc: Log meals, count calories, recipe suggestions.

items.title: Crypto tracker
items.desc: Token prices, portfolio alerts, on-chain data.

items.title: Study buddy
items.desc: Quiz you, summarize textbooks, help with homework.

items.title: Travel planner
items.desc: Find flights, plan itineraries, local picks.

items.title: Budget manager
items.desc: Track expenses, savings goals, weekly reports.

items.title: Research assistant
items.desc: Web search, summarize articles, compile reports.

items.title: Customer support
items.desc: Answer FAQs on Discord or WhatsApp, 24/7.

useCases.footer: And anything else you can describe in plain English.

frameworks.heading: Four frameworks. One platform.
frameworks.subheading: Pick the one that fits your agent. Switch whenever you want.

items.name: OpenClaw
items.desc: Powerful tools, plugins, and browser control.

items.name: Hermes
items.desc: Smart-first design for rich memory and reasoning.

items.name: Milady
items.desc: On-chain awareness, DeFi tools, token tracking.
items.features: DeFi tools · On-chain data · Token tracking

city.heading: See every agent in Hatcher City.
city.body: A live 3D city where every public agent is a building. Districts by category, colors by framework, gold beams mark yours. Drag, zoom, click any building to open it.
city.label: HATCHER CITY

items.title: Instant deploy
items.desc: From zero to running agent in under 60 seconds.

items.title: Bring your own key
items.desc: Use your own LLM API key for unlimited messages on any tier.

items.title: Secure by default
items.desc: Isolated containers, encrypted secrets, no shared data.

items.title: Live analytics
items.desc: Real-time stats, usage tracking, performance metrics.

items.title: Chat & voice
items.desc: Text chat, voice calls, real-time streaming — out of the box.

pricing.heading: Start free, grow when ready
pricing.subheading: All platforms included on every plan. Bring your own AI key for unlimited messages on any tier.
pricing.addonsNote: Need more agents, messages, or storage? Add stackable packs — all tiers get add-on flexibility.

founding.heading: Pay once, keep forever.
founding.subheading: Locked-in price, no monthly fees, all Business-tier features forever. Only 20 spots.
founding.allTaken: All {max} founding spots are taken. Standard tiers still available.
founding.claimed: {claimed} of {max} claimed · once they're gone, this offer is gone.

items.a: Yes. The free plan gives you 1 agent, 20 messages per day, and access to all platforms. No credit card required. BYOK (bring your own LLM key) = unlimited messages on any tier.

items.q: Do I need to know how to code?
items.a: Not at all! Creating an agent is like filling out a form — choose a name, describe what you want it to do, pick platforms, and launch.
Connect your own OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, or Groq key for unlimited messages. You only pay your AI provider directly.
On our cloud servers 24/7. No need to keep your computer on or install anything.

finalCta.heading: Ready to deploy your first agent?
finalCta.body: Free tier includes 1 agent with 20 messages/day. BYOK = unlimited. No credit card required.
